entities.name: GRASSPEA
entities.description: A hardy crop (Lathyrus sativus L) being researched for production and safety

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the research and development of grasspea is taking place

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The ability of grasspea to adjust to different environments

entities.name: CLIMATIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: Extreme changes in climate that the crop must withstand

entities.name: NUTRIENT VARIABILITY
entities.description: Variations in soil nutrient levels that the crop must withstand

entities.name: HARDINESS
entities.description: The quality of being able to survive difficult conditions

entities.name: SAFETY
entities.description: The requirement for the crop to be safe for human consumption

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The quality of being nutritive for feeding

entities.name: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The scientific process used to validate and improve the crop

relationships.description: Research and development of the crop is conducted in this location
The crop is noted for its ability to adapt
The crop is hardy in adapting to extremes of climatic variability
The crop is hardy in adapting to nutrient variability
The crop is naturally trained to be hardy
Science is required to make the crop safe to use
Science is required to make the crop nutritive to feed
R&D progress is used to re-validate the crop in production
